sections.paragraph:
Original: קבל

Transliteration: qâbâl

Phonetic: kaw-bawl'

BDB Definition:

  1. something in front, attacking engine, something before (noun masculine)
    1. before
    2. siege-engine, battering-ram
  2. (CLBL) before (adverb)

Origin: from H6901 in the sense of opposite [see H6904]

TWOT entry: 1980a

Part(s) of speech:
